questions.subject: operations
questions.text: Your cannon fires 3 shots, then 4 more. How many shots total?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: You had 10 gold and spent 4 on a bolt. How much gold is left?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: Each enemy drops 2 gold. You defeat 5 enemies. How much gold do you earn?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: A tower costs 70 gold. You have 100 gold. After buying it, how much remains?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: You defeat 6 ogres worth 15 gold each. What is your total reward?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: 24 sprites split evenly into 4 groups. How many sprites per group?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: Tower damage is 22. An upgrade adds 12, then another adds 8. What is the final damage?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: You earn 15 gold per wave for 8 waves, then spend 75 on an upgrade. How much gold do you have?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: A wave sends 12 enemies. Each takes 3 hits to defeat. How many total hits are needed?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: Cannon splash hits 5 enemies for 22 damage each. One survives with 8 HP. What was its starting HP?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: You have 3 towers, each firing 14 bolts/sec. One gets a 40% speed boost. What is the combined fire rate?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: An enemy has 200 HP. Tower A deals 45 damage every 3 seconds. How many seconds to defeat it?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: A tower costs 100 gold. Each upgrade costs 1.5 times the previous. First upgrade is 55. What does the third upgrade cost?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: You earn 5% interest on 200 gold saved. Then you earn a 30% early-call bonus on the interest. What is your total bonus gold?

questions.subject: operations
questions.text: Boss has 600 HP. Tower deals 45 damage/hit at 0.35 hits/sec. Freezer slows boss for 2s, letting tower get 1 extra hit. How many normal hits (without slow bonus) to finish?
